overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic dystopian city. The clip progresses from a concrete underpass toward a massive stadium structure, through a chaotic scene of burning vehicle wreckage, and along a neon-lit sidewalk with pedestrians and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass leading to stadium plaza

events.description: exits covered underpass into open plaza area with stadium view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through concrete underpass toward the massive stadium structure

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink outfit standing near concrete barrier

entered.detail: large concrete bridge overhead with metal support beams
massive circular stadium covered in neon billboards and yellow tarps
low concrete wall with vertical ridges running along walkway
large corrugated metal drainage pipe emerging from ground

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass with a view toward a massive stadium structure covered in holographic advertisements. The character walks forward on a concrete walkway, passing a person in pink standing near a barrier wall. Sparse palm trees and dry vegetation line the path as the scene transitions from the sheltered underpass to the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with vehicle wreckage and burning cars

events.description: burning vehicle wreckage with thick black smoke becomes visible ahead
character turns right toward the burning vehicles and wreckage

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the scene of burning vehicle wreckage in the plaza

notable_agents.action: man walking away from the wreckage toward the right side of the frame

entered.detail: black sedan engulfed in flames with thick smoke rising from interior
large delivery truck tilted on its side with fire damage and open cargo area
futuristic elevated roadway with geometric support structures and green accents

segments.scene_description: Moving into the open plaza, the scene reveals chaos with burning vehicles and a crashed truck. The stadium remains visible to the left while an elevated highway ramp appears on the right. The character approaches the wreckage, turning to examine the destruction as smoke billows from the burning cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with vehicle accident debris and emergency vehicles

events.description: passing close to burning car with visible corpse inside and body on ground
moving past wreckage into clearer street area with buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating past the burning wreckage and deceased individuals on the street

notable_agents.action: large black armored truck driving down the street away from camera

entered.detail: deceased person lying on pavement next to burning vehicle
tall glass and steel building with vertical architectural lines

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the aftermath of the crash, passing burning vehicles and a body on the ground. An armored truck drives away in the distance as the scene transitions from the open plaza to a city street lined with futuristic skyscrapers. The smoke from the fires creates a hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon signage and storefronts

events.description: entering shadow of building with prominent green neon tube lighting
red sports car drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk, turning to interact with NPC in pink outfit before continuing

notable_agents.action: woman in pink outfit leaning against railing near building entrance
woman with short dark hair in red top standing on sidewalk

entered.detail: building exterior with glowing green neon tubes and glass canopy entrance
sleek red futuristic sports car with aerodynamic design driving on street
large floating holographic billboard displaying advertisements between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered sidewalk area illuminated by green neon lights. The player character briefly turns to interact with an NPC in pink clothing before continuing. A red sports car speeds past on the adjacent street while holographic advertisements float in the distance between towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with parked luxury vehicles and corporate buildings

events.description: slight turn to navigate around pedestrian on sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past parked luxury cars and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person walking in same direction ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic black sedan with white wall tires and chrome details parked at curb
low silver sports car with sleek profile parked behind black sedan
green futuristic car with covered wheel wells parked at curb

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking deeper into the downtown area, passing parked luxury vehicles including a black sedan and green sports car. The neon building falls behind as the street opens up to reveal more towering skyscrapers with large corporate holograms. The sidewalk remains busy with pedestrians in the futuristic urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete underpass through a scene of urban devastation and into a vibrant, neon-lit downtown district. It begins on a concrete walkway beneath an overpass, passing a figure in pink and sparse vegetation while moving toward a massive stadium adorned with holographic advertisements. As the camera emerges into an open plaza, the environment shifts into a chaotic wreckage site filled with burning vehicles and billowing smoke, with the stadium remaining visible to the left as the character navigates the debris. The scene then transitions from the hazy aftermath of the crash toward a city street, where the lighting shifts to green neon under a covered sidewalk as a red sports car speeds past. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the urban core, passing luxury vehicles and busy pedestrians as the street opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers and corporate holograms.
